name: Bavarian Apple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, beat together the first 1/3 cup sugar, butter or margarine, shortening, and 1/4 teaspoon vanilla on medium speed of an electric mixer until combined.
2. Blend in the flour and salt until crumbly. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
3. Place apple slices in a single layer in a shallow baking pan. Cover with foil. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla until fluffy with an electric mixer.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, beating on low speed just until combined.
6. Pour into the dough-lined pan. Arrange warm apple slices atop the filling.
7. Combine the remaining 1/3 cup sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl.
8. Sprinkle the sugar mixture and sliced almonds over the filling.
9. Bake at 400°F for 40 minutes, or until golden. Cool.
10. Remove the sides of the pan and place the cake on a serving plate. Cover and chill for 4-24 hours before serving.
